headline: Assessing Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Valuation After Recent Gains And Kenvue Spin Off
summary: Recent Performance Snapshot Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading, with the stock closing at US$239.93. headline: How The Evolving Story For Kenvue (KVUE) Is Shaping Analyst Targets And Valuation
summary: Bullish analyst models around Kenvue are nudging price targets into roughly the US$18 to US$20 range, while the model fair value estimate sits at US$19.83 with no change from the prior figure. Those modest target moves line up with research that frames Q4 as better than feared but still leaves opinions split between cautious optimism and growing skepticism about how much upside is left. Read on to see what is driving these small shifts and how you can track the story as the analyst narrative...
